title: send_event blocks tokio executor when UI channel is full
description: Trigger: 256 AppEvent messages queued without the egui frame loop draining them (e.g. rapid SSE state changes, slow repaints, or window minimized). Condition: SyncSender::send() on a full sync_channel BLOCKS the calling thread. send_event() is called from within tokio::runtime::Runtime::block_on(), so blocking that thread stalls the entire async runtime — no SSE events are read, no commands are processed, and the UI appears frozen. Bad behavior: application deadlocks until the UI drains the channel, which cannot happen because the egui frame loop only runs when the OS schedules a repaint.
